history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 2, column B, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. The path ahead appears clear: moving forward to (2, C) is safe (floor). Then I plan to go right to column F, then down to row 4, then right to column H, then down to goal. So my first step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (02,C) facing right. The goal is at (08,H). To get there, I need to go down to row4, then right across row4 to column H, then down to row8. First, I will turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing down. The cell directly ahead (row 03 column C) is floor, so I can move forward safely. I need to go down to row 04 eventually and then turn right to reach column H.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column C, facing down. The goal is at row 08 column H. The immediate safe move is to go down to row 04 column C, which is empty. After that, I can turn left (counter-clockwise) to face east and then move east along row 4 to reach column H, then turn clockwise to face down and move down to the goal. Proceeding step by step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column C, facing down. To reach the goal at row 8, column H, I need to move right to column H first. To face right, I must rotate counter-clockwise from down.
</thought>
<action>GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4 column C, facing right. The goal is at row 8 column H. Directly to the right, the cells (4,D), (4,E), (4,F), (4,G), and (4,H) are all safe floor cells with no lava or walls. I can move forward to start heading towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column D facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H. I need to move right to column H then down. The next cell forward (04, E) is a safe floor cell. So I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 4, column E, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. The cell directly in front (row 4, column F) is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal along a clear path. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at (4,F) facing right. The goal is at (8,H). I can move right to (4,G) which is safe, then continue right to (4,H), then turn down and move down to the goal. So my next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column G, facing right. The goal is at row 8, column H. Directly ahead (row 4, column H) is an empty floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, and I can later turn down to go directly to the goal along the clear column H. No lava is in front, so this move is safe.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column H facing right ('>'). The goal is directly below at row 08 column H, with a clear path through cells (5,H), (6,H), (7,H) which are all empty. To move downward, I need to face south. Turning clockwise from east will make me face south.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column H, facing down. The goal is directly below at row 08, column H. The cells directly in front (rows 05, 06, 07, all column H) are empty (no walls or lava). I can move straight down to reach the goal. So I will move forward one step.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row5 column H facing down. The goal is directly below at row8 column H. The cell directly in front (row6 column H) is empty floor. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 6, column H, facing down. The goal is at row 8, column H directly below. The cell directly ahead (row 7, column H) is a floor cell, so it is safe to move forward. I will take one step forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column H facing down (v). The goal cell O is directly in front of me at row 08 column H. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
